misc: His usual shot shape could be described as a "power draw".
biography: Jussi, a familiar face from St. Laurence Golf, brings a blend of experience and competitive spirit to the Hector Trophée. Known for his powerful draw, Jussi has the ability to shape the ball in a way that maximizes both distance and control.

With 4 past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Jussi has consistently demonstrated a high level of play. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his dedication and skill are evident each time he tees off.

Though Jussi is not currently slated to participate in the Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts know that last-minute changes are always a possibility. Whether or not he appears in the upcoming tournament, Jussi's presence in the world of golf remains noteworthy.
